title: Agalma multiramosum

The classification of this organism is as follows: Kingdom: Animalia, Phylum: Cnidaria, Class: Hydrozoa, Order: Trachymedusae, Family: Agalmidae, Genus: Agalma, Species: A. multiramosum.
